channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's pick for intel chief could imperil a key U.S. spy tool. Who is Bill Pulte?
item.description: Pulte's appointment has scrambled talks to renew a spy tool known as FISA 702, as lawmakers in both parties have been vocal about his lack of national...

item.title: Along the 7 train in Queens, World Cup fans welcome the 'beautiful game'
item.description: The 2026 World Cup is being played in New Jersey, but in Queens, New York, home to immigrants from all over the world, soccer is not just a sport. It'...

item.title: Key World Cup statistics to help you sound knowledgeable
item.description: With 48 teams and 1,248 players, the 2026 FIFA World Cup offers countless stats. Here are some highlights.

item.title: SpaceX prepares for launch with record-breaking IPO expected
item.description: Elon Musk's rocket company, now merged with xAI, aims to raise $75 billion in its IPO. It is the first of three...
